verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: To Edessa he made his journey, and found in it a great work:

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: For the king was become a labourer for the church, and was building it.

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: The apostle Addæus stood in it like a builder,

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: And King Abgar laid aside his diadem and builded with him.

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: When apostle and king concurred the one with the other,

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: What idol must not fall before them?

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: Satan fled to the land of Babylon from the disciples,

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: And the tale of the crucifixion had got before him to the country of the Chaldeans.

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: He said, when they were making sport of the signs of the Zodiac, that he was nothing.
